chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Hello friends, I am going to start a next topic in algorithms that is divide and conquer

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The first topic was analysis of algorithm.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: In that topic I have shown you how to write an algorithm and how to analyze an algorithm

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and what is the purpose of analysis.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now the next topic is divide and conquer.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This topic is related to a strategy for solving a problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Like this we have other strategies also in the subject like greedy method, dynamic programming,

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: backtracking, branch and bound.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is one of the strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us understand what is a strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Strategy is an approach or a design for solving a problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: For solving any problem computational problem you can adopt this strategy for solving the

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: problem if the strategy is suitable for the problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So by practice you can come to know there is no formula that this is the problem this

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: strategy is applicable though there are few guidelines.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we can follow those guidelines and we can apply the strategy for solving a problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If a problem of some size is given let us say size is n.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The size is size of the input for a problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if a problem P is there of some size and if we say that this problem is large then

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: you can break this problem into smaller sub problems P1, P2, P3 goes on as many problems

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: as possible that depends on you.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us say K sub problems.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now the large problem is broken down into smaller sub problems.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the size was larger so we have broken to smaller size problems.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now these problems sub problems can be solved to obtain their solutions.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for this solution 1, solution 2 and solution 3 and so on for this solution K.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: All these are individually solved.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now once you have the solutions for these you can combine these solutions to get a solution

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: for main problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if a problem is large divide the problem into sub problems and solve those sub problems

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and combine the solutions of sub problems to get the solution for main problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So it means if a problem cannot be solved if it is too big break it into sub problems

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and solve it.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If a sub problem is also large then do the same thing apply divide and conquer strategy

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: on sub problems also.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If it is large again do the same thing break it into sub sub problems and find the solutions

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: combine the solution.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now one important thing about divide and conquer whatever the problem is the sub problems will

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: be same as that problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: For example if problem is to sort then the sub problems should also be sort or each and

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: every sub problem should be sort only.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: It cannot convert into some other problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Like example if problem is I will take some real example if a problem is to conduct a

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: workshop at a college then it is a big work so you can divide the work.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Preparing invitations, preparing posters, inviting guests and inviting resource persons,

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: arranging resource person it is a different task.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Each is a different task.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: No this is not divide and conquer.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If example this is sort then the sub problem should also be sort only.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then we call it as divide and conquer strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if a major problem cannot be solved divide it and those problems should also be same.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this how it is recursive in nature.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Like this problem is sorting then these problems are also sorting.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So divide and conquer algorithms when you write or strategy when you take it will be

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: a recursive.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So it says that you recursively solve the problem if it is too big recursively solve

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: it.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And one important thing is when you have broken the problem into sub problem you should have

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: some method for combining their solutions to get a main solution.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If you are unable to combine then you cannot adopt this strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is a guideline you can see.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: See if any problem how you can understand can I apply divide and conquer on this one

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: or not.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So if you break it the problem should remain same then you can apply divide and conquer

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: or you should keep it same then divide and conquer strategy is applicable.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And you should have a method for combining them.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So this is the approach of a divide and conquer strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Here is a general method for divide and conquer strategy.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Apply divide and conquer upon a problem P. If small p if the problem is small then directly

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: solve it.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Yes definitely there must be a solution for small problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If it is large you are breaking it.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If it is small then what?

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Solve it directly.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If it is large divide the problem P into sub problem P1, P2 to Pk and apply divide and

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: conquer on each.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This is recursive.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Then whatever the solutions you get you combine these solutions.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Combine the solutions of the results of divide and conquer of P1, divide and conquer of P2

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and so on.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Combine them together to get the solution for main problem.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So here you can see that it has having a recursive property.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So the procedures are recursive and the algorithms are recursive.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: These are the problems that are there under this topic.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Binary search, finding maximum and minimum, Merge sort, quick sort, Strassen's matrix

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: multiplication.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: We will look at all these problems that will be over different videos divided into multiple

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: videos.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And one more thing is divide and conquer strategy is recursive.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we should know how to write recursive algorithms, how to write recursive functions and how to

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: analyze them, how to find the time complexities for them.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So for that we use recurrence relations.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So my next video will be on recurrence relation.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So I will be having multiple videos on them.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So I will be showing various type of recurrence relations and their solutions.

chunks.title: Divide And Conquer - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So you watch all of them so that you can get a complete idea about recurrence relations.
